perspectives.description: The parent who has maintained a friendly relationship with their child's ex-partner and is faced with the decision of whether to confront them about their child's issues.
The child who is struggling with personal issues after a breakup and may feel hurt or unsupported if their parent confronts their ex-partner.
The ex-partner who may be unfairly blamed for the child's issues and could face a damaged relationship with the parent if confronted.
